name: saltcorn-samba
description: Saltcorn plugin: browse, upload, rename and delete files on a Samba/CIFS share. File-manager view, directory tree, inline PDF viewer, external-app open (smb://).

scripts.lint: node --check index.js && node --check smb-client.js && node --check tree-view.js && node --check filemanager-view.js && node --check pdf-view.js && node --check public/samba-tree.js && node --check public/samba-filemanager.js

author: Peter Vassen <ich@peter-vassen.de>
